title: ortholoma illepidum
intro: Ortholoma illepidum, also known as the rough-seeded ortholoma, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ortholoma illepidum include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
